004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
030
031/**
032 * A session for a single HTTP request.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * This session object gets created by {@link RestSession} once the Java method to be invoked has been determined.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 */
042@SuppressWarnings({
043   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_ctx, ARG_ctx)
044   "resource"   // delegate access — RestSession owns the bean store and closes it; fluent add() calls return the same store.
045})
046public class RestOpSession extends ContextSession {
047
048   // Property name constants
049   private static final String PROP_ctx = "ctx";
050   private static final String PROP_session = "session";
051
052   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
053   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
054   private static final String ARG_session = "session";
055
056   /**
057    * Builder class.
058    */
059   @SuppressWarnings({
060      "rawtypes" // Raw types required: annotation type parameter is unknown at static analysis time.
061   })
062   public static class Builder extends ContextSession.Builder {
063
064      protected final RestOpContext ctx;
065      protected final RestSession session;
066
067      /**
068       * Constructor.
069       *
070       * @param ctx The context object of the Java method being invoked.
071       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
072       * @param session The REST session object creating this object.
073       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
074       */
075      public Builder(RestOpContext ctx, RestSession session) {
076         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
077         this.ctx = ctx;
078         this.session = assertArgNotNull(ARG_session, session);
079      }
080
081      @Override /* Overridden from Session.Builder */
082      public RestOpSession build() {
083         return new RestOpSession(this);
084      }
085
086      /**
087       * Enables or disabled debug mode on this call.
088       *
089       * @param value The new value for this setting.
090       * @return This object.
091       * @throws IOException Occurs if request content could not be cached into memory.
092       */
093      public Builder debug(boolean value) throws IOException {
094         session.debug(value);
095         return this;
096      }
097
098      /**
099       * Sets the logger to use when logging this call.
100       *
101       * @param value The new value for this setting.
102       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (will use the default logger from the context if available).
103       * @return This object.
104       */
105      public Builder logger(CallLogger value) {
106         session.logger(value);
107         return this;
108      }
109   }
110
111   /**
112    * Static creator.
113    *
114    * @param ctx The context object of the Java method being invoked.
115    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
116    * @param session The REST session object creating this object.
117    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
118    * @return A new builder.
119    */
120   public static Builder create(RestOpContext ctx, RestSession session) {
121      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx), assertArgNotNull(ARG_session, session));
122   }
123
124   private final RestOpContext ctx;
125   private final RestRequest req;
126   private final RestResponse res;
127   private final RestSession session;
128
129   /**
130    * Constructor.
131    *
132    * @param builder The builder for this object.
133    */
134   protected RestOpSession(Builder builder) {
135      super(builder);
136      ctx = builder.ctx;
137      session = builder.session;
138      try {
139         req = session.getBeanStore().add(RestRequest.class, ctx.createRequest(session));
140         res = session.getBeanStore().add(RestResponse.class, ctx.createResponse(session, req));
141      } catch (RuntimeException e) {
142         throw e;
143      } catch (Exception e) {
144         throw new InternalServerError(e);
145      }
146   }
147
148   /**
149    * Called at the end of a call to finish any remaining tasks such as flushing buffers and logging the response.
150    *
151    * @return This object.
152    */
153   public RestOpSession finish() {
154      // When AsyncResponseProcessor has handed off to a real AsyncContext, the response will be
155      // committed by AsyncContext.complete() inside the future's whenComplete callback — synchronously
156      // flushing here would commit the response prematurely.
157      if (AsyncResponseProcessor.isAsyncDispatchOwned(this))
158         return this;
159      try {
160         res.flushBuffer();
161         req.close();
162      } catch (Exception e) {
163         session.exception(e);
164      }
165      return this;
166   }
167
168   /**
169    * Returns the bean store for this session.
170    *
171    * @return The bean store for this session.
172    */
173   public WritableBeanStore getBeanStore() { return session.getBeanStore(); }
174
175   @Override /* Overridden from ContextSession */
176   public RestOpContext getContext() { return ctx; }
177
178   /**
179    * Returns the REST request object for this session.
180    *
181    * @return The REST request object for this session.
182    */
183   public RestRequest getRequest() { return req; }
184
185   /**
186    * Returns the REST response object for this session.
187    *
188    * @return The REST response object for this session.
189    */
190   public RestResponse getResponse() { return res; }
191
192   /**
193    * Returns the context of the parent class of this Java method.
194    *
195    * @return The context of the parent class of this Java method.
196    */
197   public RestContext getRestContext() { return session.getContext(); }
198
199   /**
200    * Returns the session of the parent class of this Java method.
201    *
202    * @return The session of the parent class of this Java method.
203    */
204   public RestSession getRestSession() { return session; }
205
206   /**
207    * Runs this session.
208    *
209    * <p>
210    * Does the following:
211    * <ol>
212    *    <li>Runs the guards on the method.
213    *    <li>Finds the parameter values to pass to the Java method.
214    *    <li>Invokes the Java method.
215    *    <li>Sets the output and status on the response.
216    *    <li>Calls the converters on the Java method.
217    * </ol>
218    *
219    * @throws Exception Any exception can be thrown.
220    */
221   public void run() throws Exception {
222      for (var guard : ctx.getGuards()) {
223         if (! guard.guard(req, res))
224            return;
225      }
226
227      ctx.getMethodInvoker().invokeOp(this);
228
229      if (res.hasContent())
230         for (var converter : ctx.getConverters())
231            res.setContent(converter.convert(req, res.getContent().orElse(null)));
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Sets the status of the response.
236    *
237    * @param value The new status.
238    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (ignored).
239    * @return This object.
240    */
241   public RestOpSession status(HttpStatusLine value) {
242      session.status(value);
243      return this;
244   }
245
246   @Override /* Overridden from ContextSession */
247   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
248      return super.properties()
249         .a(PROP_ctx, ctx)
250         .a(PROP_session, session);
251   }
252}
